titleStmt.title: A transcription of Romans in 049
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Epistle to the Romans
Romans

respStmt.name: The International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: This transcription was made as part of the CATENA project, which has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no. 770816).

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

editionStmt.edition: Version 1.1, created on 25.01.2021, archived on the University of Birmingham eData repository on 13.5.2024.

publisher.name: The International Greek New Testament Project (IGNTP)

availability.p: Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) Available for re-use under a creative commons license provided attribution is made to the original creators.

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior.

editorialDecl.p: This transcription was produced using the online transcription editor developed by the Center for Digital Humanities at the University of Trier as part of the Workspace for Collaborative Editing Project between 2010 and 2013 and made available for use by the Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing and the University of Birmingham.
The XML specifications used are version 1.6 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

ab.note: A later hand adds σαββατον μετα την πεντηκοστην.
A later hand adds κυριακη β in the left margin.
A later hand adds σαββατον β in the right margin.
A later hand adds σαββατον γ in the left margin.
A later hands adds αδλεφοι κυριακη γ in the left margin.
A later hand adds τελος της κυριακης in the right margin.
A later hand adds κυριακη δ in the right margin.
A later hand adds the incipit αδελφοι οσοι πνευματι in the right margin, along with the heading σαββατον ε.
A later hand adds τελος του σαββατου in the left margin.
A later hand adds αδελφοι in the left margin, and σαββατω ϛ in the right margin.
A later hands adds κυριακη ε to the left margin.
A later hand adds σαββατον ζ in the right margin.
A later hand adds κυριακη ϛ in the right margin.
A later hand adds σαββατον η in the left margin.
A later hand adds κυριακη της τυροφαγου in the right margin.
A later hand adds σαββατον θ in the left margin.
A later hand adds σαββατον της τυροφαγου in the right margin.
A later hand adds κυριακη ζ to the left margin.
A later hand adds κυριακη ι in the left margin.
